question: Total Kills Over/Under 47.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Heroic and REKONIX in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 9:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 48 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Heroic vs REKONIX (BO3) - BLAST Slam Play-In
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Heroic and REKONIX in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against REKONIX.

This market will resolve to "REKONIX" if REKONIX win the match against Heroic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: First Blood in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between Heroic and REKONIX in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 9:00AM ET:

This market will resolve to the team that secures the first blood in Game 2.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to stoppage. If the first blood did not occur, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to the remake. If the first blood did not occur prior to the remake, resolution will be based on the remade game.

If Game 2 is completed but first blood never occurred, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Counter-Strike: The Huns Esports vs Morningstar (BO3) - Yuqilin Pinnacle of Battle Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between The Huns Esports and Morningstar in the Yuqilin Pinnacle of Battle Playoffs, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "The Huns Esports" if The Huns Esports win the match against Morningstar.

This market will resolve to "Morningstar" if Morningstar win the match against The Huns Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Counter-Strike: M80 vs Wildcard (BO3) - Ace North American Masters Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between M80 and Wildcard in the Ace North American Masters Playoffs, scheduled for February 6 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "M80" if M80 win the match against Wildcard.

This market will resolve to "Wildcard" if Wildcard win the match against M80.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

This market will resolve to "FULL SENSE" if FULL SENSE win the match against Hydra Esports.

This market will resolve to "Hydra Esports" if Hydra Esports win the match against FULL SENSE.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page.

This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Tenacity and King of Gamers Club in the RoV Pro League Group Stage, scheduled for February 6 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Tenacity" if Tenacity win Game 3 against King of Gamers Club.

This market will resolve to "King of Gamers Club" if King of Gamers Club win Game 3 against Tenacity.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 3 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 3. 

If Game 3 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 7, 1:00AM-1:15AM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 42.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Falcons and Xtreme Gaming in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 7 at 12:00PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 43 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Team Falcons vs Xtreme Gaming (BO3) - BLAST Slam Play-In
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Falcons and Xtreme Gaming in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 7 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons win the match against Xtreme Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Xtreme Gaming" if Xtreme Gaming win the match against Team Falcons.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

description:

question: XRP Up or Down - February 8, 3AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
